# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test

## Module

Affected module or area:

## ADR Check

- [ ] No ADR required
- [ ] ADR added or updated
- [ ] Existing ADR referenced

## Verification

Describe how this was checked.

## Notes

Mention risks, follow-up work, or open questions.
